title: botrychium rugulosum
intro: Botrychium rugulosum, also known as rusty-shouldered fern or wrinkled grape fern, is a type of rare and endangered fern species belonging to the family Osmundaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Botrychium rugulosum include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying and crushing the leaves, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
